AuthClaw security policy.
Encryption: Enforce AES-256 for all data-at-rest. Enforce TLS 1.3 for data-in-transit.
Access Control: Enforce role-based access control (RBAC).
Multi-Factor Authentication: MFA is required for admin accounts.
Data Retention: Customer PII is retained for 7 years.
Audit Logging: Keep audit logs.
Consent: Get consent.
